name: Manison #10
description: Al-Jabhah, 'The Forehead,' ruled by Venus in her more challenging aspect, creates difficulties in matters of the heart while providing success in business, learning, and practical endeavors. The Forehead of Leo represents intellectual prowess over emotional entanglement. The artwork visualizes the lion's brow with Zeta and Gamma Leonis in Venus' sage-green palette, with geometric patterns favoring mental clarity over romance.

attributes.value: Business dealings, learning skills, seeking wisdom
